scripts.build:ts: bun build src/content.ts --format=iife --outfile=dist/content.js && bun build src/popup.ts --format=iife --outfile=dist/popup.js
scripts.build:static: cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r icons dist/ && cp src/popup.html dist/
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun run build:ts && bun run build:css && bun run build:static
